creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
x11-toolkits/FWF was marked broken for ELF in October last year
	when Xpm had its major version number bumped for ELF during the
	brief window during which Satoshi went mad. ;-)

	Since then, the dependency on Xpm works, but now the port is
	broken because of a define that conflicts with a define which
	has been added to xmkmf's FreeBSD.cf in later versions of
	XFree86. *phew*

Fix: The following diff will create patch-ah to fix the problem:
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/FWF ; make configure
